summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was invented. The preflight artifact hydrated 20 open PRs and reported no security-sensitive job refs; each hydrated PR is kept as an independent open PR because none is a duplicate, superseded, low-signal closeout, or mergeable under this job's blocked merge/fix actions. Five listed refs were not hydrated in the provided preflight artifact, so they require item-scoped human/refreshed-preflight follow-up before classification.
